summary: A Go-based monolithic tool leveraging MCP for test orchestration and Goss configuration migration, currently undergoing heavy automated test expansion via parallel AI agents.
concerns: Build failure in GOrchestra/glm-agents/0011-tests-internalreportertapgo-fi/context/tap.go due to undefined TestResult type
Highly fragmented test generation across many agent directories suggests potential merge conflicts or test duplication
Heavy reliance on automated agent-generated tests may lead to brittle or low-value test coverage
suggestions: Fix the undefined TestResul... build error in the TAP reporter context
Consolidate and deduplicate the agent-generated extra tests into the main test files
Review the quality and assertion depth of the agent-generated tests to ensure they provide real value
